story-context.title: Security Fuzz Testing with Jazzer
story-context.summary: Implement fuzz tests with Jazzer 0.25.1 for JWT security components (format parsing, token extraction, role normalization) to discover vulnerabilities, edge cases, and DoS conditions automatically.
story-context.fuzz-targets: - JwtFormatFuzzer.kt: Fuzzes JWT token format parsing (5min) - TokenExtractorFuzzer.kt: Fuzzes Bearer token extraction from headers (5min) - RoleNormalizationFuzzer.kt: Fuzzes Keycloak role claim structures (5min) - Total execution: 15 minutes (nightly CI/CD)
story-context.key-code: - Jazzer @FuzzTest annotation - FuzzedDataProvider for input generation - Corpus caching in fuzzTest/corpus/ for regression prevention - ./gradlew fuzzTest task integration
story-context.testing: Each fuzz test runs 5 minutes, Corpus caching enabled, All fuzz tests pass without crashes or DoS, Nightly CI/CD integration, Discovered vulnerabilities documented and fixed
